author: cmcdnd
name: Record: Train Larger, Quantize Harder — 33.6M params in 15.9MB via Int5 GPTQ
blurb: Train Larger, Quantize Harder: 33.6M params (50% more than int6 baselines) via int5 QAT (PR #469) + full Hessian GPTQ + 2% magnitude pruning. Post-TTT temperature calibration (T=0.98) corrects TTT-induced overconfidence for -0.003 BPB. MHA 8/8, MLP 3.5x, BigramHash(8192), XSA-all, LeakyReLU², EMA, VE128, Partial RoPE, LN Scale, U-Net skips.
